43. MOU on Imposing Combined Punishments on the Trust-Breaking Business Entities and Their
               Personnel in the Area of Environmental Protection [关于对环境保护领域失信生产经营单位及其有关
               人员开展联合惩戒的合作备忘录], July 20, 2016.
                    44. MOU on Imposing Combined Punishments on the Seriously Trust-Breaking Parties Concerned in
               the Area of Tourism [关于对旅游领域严重失信相关责任主体实施联合惩戒的合作备忘录], May 18,
               2018.

               Jeopardize the Public Order in Medical Care [关于对严重危害正常医疗秩序的失信行为责任人实施联
               合惩戒合作备忘录], September 25, 2018.
